overrides.override_summary: California Franchise Relations Act and Franchise Investment Law may supersede FA provisions on termination, renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: CA law controls if inconsistent with FA

overrides.override_summary: Florida law application may not be enforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees may litigate in CA

overrides.override_summary: General release excluded to extent required by Corps Code §31512 and Bus & Prof Code §20010
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees cannot be forced to waive franchise law claims on renewal/transfer

overrides.override_summary: Post-term covenant not to compete may not be enforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees may be free to compete immediately after termination

overrides.override_summary: Jury trial waiver may not be enforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees retain right to jury trial

overrides.override_summary: No questionnaire or acknowledgment may waive franchise law claims or disclaim reliance on franchisor statements
Termination only for good cause; 30-day cure required
overrides.why_it_matters: MI law prohibits termination without good cause

overrides.override_summary: Right to join franchisee association cannot be prohibited
Cannot require release as condition of franchise grant — waiver void
Cannot require arbitration or litigation outside MI
overrides.why_it_matters: MI franchisees can dispute in MI

overrides.override_summary: Cannot refuse transfer except for good cause
overrides.why_it_matters: Limited grounds for transfer denial in MI

overrides.override_summary: Washington Franchise Investment Protection Act prevails in conflict
overrides.why_it_matters: WA law controls over FL law

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration/mediation/litigation site must be in WA or mutually agreed
overrides.why_it_matters: WA franchisees can litigate in WA

overrides.override_summary: Release void except in negotiated settlement after FA in effect, with independent counsel
overrides.why_it_matters: Strong protection against forced releases on renewal/transfer

overrides.override_summary: Unreasonable restrictions on statute of limitations or jury trial rights may not be enforceable
Transfer fees must reflect reasonable estimated or actual costs
overrides.why_it_matters: Limits transfer fee to cost basis

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may terminate under any grounds permitted by state law
No signed statement may waive franchise law claims or disclaim reliance

notes: Only CA, MI, and WA addenda were directly read in detail. Remaining states (IL, IN, MD, MN, NY, ND, RI, VA, WI) were identified in page headers but not individually structured. The override patterns for IL, MD, MN, NY, ND, RI, VA, WI are likely similar to the CA/WA templates but specific details were not extracted.
